zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Barnham Southwick於大約1518年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，他的父親Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwick39歲，母親Dorothy Chapman35歲。他於大約1544年與Alice Cressey在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1576年4月1日享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Barnham Southwick于大约1518年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，他的父亲Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwick39岁，母亲Dorothy Chapman35岁。他于大约1544年与Alice Cressey在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1576年4月1日享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barnham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from either of the places named Barnham, in Suffolk and Sussex, or from Barnham Broom in Norfolk. Each of these place-names is from the Old English male personal name Beorn or Beorna, + hām ‘large farming estate’.

variants.name: Barnum
meanings: Altered form of English Barnham: habitational name from any of the places called Barnham in Suffolk and West Sussex, or Barnham Broom in Norfolk, all of which were named with the male personal name Beorn or Beorna + Old English hām ‘homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: Southwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Southwick, including those in Durham, Gloucestershire, Hampshire, Northamptonshire, Sussex, and Wiltshire, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + wīc ‘dwelling, specialized farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Barnham Southwick was born about 1518, in London, Middlesex, England, his father, Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwick, was 39 and his mother, Dorothy Chapman, was 35. He married Alice Cressey about 1544, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 1 April 1576, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Barnham Southwick est né environ 1518, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwick, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Chapman, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Alice Cressey environ 1544, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 1 avril 1576, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Barnham Southwick um 1518 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwick 39 und seine Mutter Dorothy Chapman 35. Er hat um 1544 in England, United Kingdom Alice Cressey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. April 1576 im Alter von 59 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Barnham Southwick è nato il circa 1518 nel London, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwick, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Dorothy Chapman, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Alice Cressey circa 1544, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 aprile 1576, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Barnham Southwickが約1518年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwickは39歳，母Dorothy Chapmanは35歳であった。約1544年にイギリスイギリスでAlice Cresseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1576年4月1日に59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Barnham Southwick(이)가 대략 1518년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwick(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy Chapman(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1544년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Alice Cressey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1576년 4월 1일 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Barnham Southwick nasceu aproximadamente 1518, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwick, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Chapman, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Cressey aproximadamente 1544, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de abril de 1576, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Barnham Southwick родился около 1518 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwick было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Chapman, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Cressey около 1544 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 1 апреля 1576 г. в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Barnham Southwick nació aproximadamente 1518, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Stephen Barnham of Southwick, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Dorothy Chapman, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Alice Cressey aproximadamente 1544, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de abril de 1576, a la edad de 59 años.
